note: ODRL 2.2 marks grantUse as 'Included In: use'; followed literally, every use-grantee could mint downstream grants (privilege escalation). The profile RESTRICTS the hierarchy: delegation authority MUST be granted by a rule whose action is literally odrl:grantUse.
title: profile restriction: a bare odrl:use permission does NOT authorise delegation (grantUse must be literal) → deny
